_note: Deliberate exceptions for the vocab guard (scripts/check-vocab.ts). Each entry is a vocabulary local name the guard would otherwise reject, with a reason. Keep this small and reviewed: an allowlisted term is one we knowingly reference even though it is not in the upstream vocabulary snapshot. Prefer fixing the reference over adding an entry.

gs1.reason: UNTP interop bridge alias; GS1 has no `product` property (only gs1:Product class). Correct bridge target pending interop-bridge review.
Example data uses gs1:Country-<ISO> individuals; GS1 defines gs1:Country class but not per-country individuals. Pending: switch examples to a published country code scheme.
